rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use visible component ports in type-level contracts, avoiding implementation-only subcomponent paths
Ensure AGREE scalar types are declared with valid names: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must reference visible ports and features; avoid internal subcomponent ports
When defining constants or equations, use valid AGREE scalar type names
anti_patterns: Do not place AGREE contracts for component ports in implementation scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
